title: Deconstruct the WebSocket Framing Layer
description: Analyze OpCodes, Masking, and Payload fragmentation within the WebSocket framing layer. Deconstruct the low-level mechanics of the `ws` protocol for efficient data transfer.
objectives: Analyze OpCodes, Masking, and Payload fragmentation within the WebSocket framing layer.
Deconstruct the low-level mechanics of the `ws` protocol for efficient data transfer.
